issues.title: Spring AI Release plan
issues.body: Thanks for your good work with Spring AI. We still are using 1.0.0.M5 for some time now. When are we going to see release version? so we can plan for production rollouts. Thanks

comments.body: `1.0.0-M6` release is imminent. It will be available soon.
What does M stands for? Milestone? It is not release version, right? we are looking for GA/Release version.

M stands for Milestone
RC for Release Candidate

Spring AI milestones are declared [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/milestones)
